\c[2]Man:\c[0]
Hello, may I offer you a drink?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sorry, not in the mood.

\c[2]Man:\c[0]
Then you should have a drink. To lighten up your mood.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Look...
(\c[23]She started to talk very angrily.\c[0])
(\c[23]The man might also realize that.\c[0])

\c[2]Man:\c[0]
I understand. You are not looking for company. Sorry to bother you.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He doesn't sound bad. And I'm sitting here with nothing better to do. It will also be good for me to get to know more people in this town.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Wait, let's have a drink.

\c[2]Man:\c[0]

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Surprise me.

\c[2]Man:\c[0]

BG_Cafe_Night

\c[2]Man:\c[0]
Here you go. Apparently, this is the signature drink of this cafe.

\c[2]Man:\c[0]
I'm Alex, by the way.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I'm Jane.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Nice to meet you, Jane.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Same here.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
If you don't mind me asking, why were you not in the mood?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Someone is supposed to meet me here. But she couldn't come. So I'm sitting alone with nothing better to do.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well, it's a good thing I found you. Now you have something to do.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess so.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So, what do you do?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I work for GRN Corp.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] GRN Corp! The company I used to work for. What are the odds!\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
(coldly) Really! How long have you been working there?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
For a while. I am a pretty big deal there.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Yeah, right! He is bluffing, and I would've known if he was someone important.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really! What do you do there?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
A lot of things. You know, complicated business stuff.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
"Complicated business stuff." Right!
(\c[23]She had to try her best to keep herself from laughing.\c[0])

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So what do you do?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Me? I'm currently unemployed.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Oh. Sorry to hear that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don't be. I am just taking a break.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well then, in that case, enjoy your break.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So, the friend you were waiting for, is she your girlfriend?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
She is a girl and my friend. So yeah, I guess she IS my girlfriend.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Hahaha. I see what you mean.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
If you don't mind me asking, Are you the kind of girl who only dates because they are looking for a serious relationship?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why? Do you wanna ask me out?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
That depends. I'm not looking for any relationship right now.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So if you are into that, I won't waste more of your time.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23]Am I looking for a serious relationship? I broke up with my last boyfriend when I got fired.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I dated him for over 8 months, so I guess it was kind of serious.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But what about now? Do I really need more drama in my life?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] No. I don't think so. I should spend more time on myself.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No. I don't have time for this crap in my life right now.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Fantastic. Then I can spend more time with you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Aren't you full of yourself! What makes you think I'm interested in you?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well, for one thing, you are still talking to me.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
And also, look at my face. How can you not be interested in such a handsome guy like me? Haha.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, keep telling yourself that.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So, since both of us are attractive and single, why don't we spend some quality time together. No strings attached.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] So, he just wants to have sex. Typical man.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Let's act naive and see where it goes.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you mean?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Look, I'm very committed to my career and have no time to take a girl to the movies or dinner date.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Oh! I get it. You just want your reward without any hard work.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Come on, it's not like that.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
All I am saying is we are both adults and have sexual needs.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
And since neither of us wants any relationship bull crap, we can spend some quality time together and go our separate ways.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Is he right? Should I do it?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Last time I had sex was with my ex-boyfriend. It's been a while since then.\c[0])
\c[27]Have sex!
\c[24]Don't
\c[27]Have sex!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright, let's do this.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
(Smiling) Okay, let's go to your place.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why? What's wrong with yours?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
My apartment is currently under renovation. It's not in shape to bring a girl over.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
We can't go to my place. Because I don't have a place.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It's a long story, but currently I'm living with my parents.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Oh, man. This is very disappointing. Unless...

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Hey, are you up for an adventure?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you have in mind?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Why don't we do it here, in the restroom.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What! You are kidding!

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Why not? Don't tell me you've never done it before?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well...I did ...once. But it was a long time ago. When I was in college.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Really! I'm surprised!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don't be. I'm not as innocent as I look.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So what do you say? Up for an adventure?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Well, as Rebecca said earlier, I should loosen up a bit and have some fun.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know what? Let's go.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Really! Umm...Ah...yeah...sure. Let's go.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
We can't go together! You go ahead, I will meet you there.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Yeah, you are right. I will wait for you in the restroom. Join me in a few minutes.

(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] First, fix your damn life!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] You can have your fun later.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
She hasn't shown up yet.

(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Finally! She decided to show up! I almost lost all hope and thought about leaving.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hey! Mrs Albert, over here.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hey, Mrs. Albert. How's it going?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Just call me Samantha. I don’t like using my husband's name.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And you must be the mystery girl.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yes. I’m Jane.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And I am short on time.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I almost changed my mind about coming here, but curiosity got the best of me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
So, why don’t you tell me how you got all that private information about me?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< I think the best approach here would be to just be honest.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< She's not someone you can fool easily.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, I hired a hacker to hack into the company server and got hold of some private emails between you and your husband.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You just admitted to a crime.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Not worried I'm recording this conversation?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You don’t seem like the type to resort to such shady tactics.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You don’t know me well enough to come to that conclusion.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Fair enough. I could be wrong.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But in that call earlier, I did come across as a sleazy person by revealing all that private information about you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So I'm trying to make amends and prove my sincerity.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Hmm, making yourself vulnerable. Risky move.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, I know. But that's how serious I am about this.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You're quite the interesting character!

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Interesting enough to work with me?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
No. But I will give you a chance to convince me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
'Cause right now, I don't see how helping you benefits me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I might not love the guy anymore, but plotting against him would make me his enemy.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And he's ruthless to his enemies.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I'm well aware.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Oh, really?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Looks like you experienced it first-hand.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Wanna tell me what happened?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, sure.
\><CENTER>Jane gave her a brief summary of everything...

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Hmm…my husband did some awful things to you. If it were me, I'd want revenge too.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
But as much as I feel sorry for you, you still haven’t given a reason to help you.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
If anything, now that I know what he did to you, I'm even less inclined to get involved.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
And yet you are still here instead of walking away.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Which means, there’s something you want from me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Aren’t you a clever girl?!

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
But no, I don't 'want' anything. I'm wondering if you can do something for me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Because right now, I don’t know much about you. Or if you have the capability to bring my husband down.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
If you could do that for me, not only would you prove yourself as a capable woman, it will even help you remove my husband from the company.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Is that so? In that case, What do you want me to do?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You know why Albert and I split?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Because you guys had a disagreement about how to run the company?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Yes. But that’s not the only reason.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
He's been cheating on me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Multiple affairs, some with company employees.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Not surprised. He's a piece of trash.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No wonder you got separated. I am more surprised that you haven’t divorced him yet.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
That’s because of the prenup I signed. So I won’t benefit much by divorcing him right now.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
But if I had proof of his extramarital affairs, the prenup would be void.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And I would get half of everything he owns, including company shares.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So if you get half the shares, can you kick him out?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Yep. Not everyone on the board likes him, but he's the majority shareholder.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
With half his shares, I can team up with others on the board, boot him out, and reform the company.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
What do you think?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Solid plan. You've got it all figured out.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Been thinking about it for a while, just lacked the means until now.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
So, if you're as smart as I think, you know what I want from you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You want evidence of him cheating.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Bingo!

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Can you do that?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Since the day he fired me, I dreamed of getting back at him. Now that I found a way, no way I'm letting it slide.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I'll dig up every dirty detail on his affairs for you.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I like your enthusiasm. But it won’t be that easy.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
He knows what would happen if he gets caught with another woman. So he is very careful about it.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I once hired a private detective, but he couldn’t find anything.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I think I can do a little better than some private detective.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Besides, I have the backing of a very powerful person. I'm not in this alone.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Really? Good to know.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
In that case, I’m expecting some good result from you. The sooner the better.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You’ll have it.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Then let’s call it a day.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And you already have my contact info. So give me a call once you have something to share.
$gameSelfSwitches.setValue(key, false);

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Ah, you're already here. Hope you didn't wait long.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No, I just got here myself.

\>\c[14]Waitress:\c[0]\<
Can I get you ladies anything to drink?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
A cappuccino. And you, Jane?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I'll have the same.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Two cappuccinos please.

\>\c[14]Waitress:\c[0]\<
Coming right up.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Well, let's hear it. What's this good news you have for me?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I have a video of your husband having sex with someone else.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Seriously?!

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Of course. I wouldn’t joke about something like that.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I know. It’s just... so hard to believe. I almost gave up on divorcing him and getting my fair share.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
God, you have no idea how happy I am right now! I can finally get out of this toxic marriage.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’m glad you’re happy. But I hope you didn’t forget about our deal.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Of course not. I've been busy too.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
While you were gathering evidence on my husband, I was working on building alliances with other executives on the board.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I've been quietly gathering support, and once I get half of his share, he'll no longer be in control of the company.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Not just that, I'll have enough votes to kick him off the board entirely.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Does that mean you'll be in charge after that?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
That's correct. And I intend to make some much-needed changes to the company.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
But I think I'm getting ahead of myself. Let's take one step at a time.

\>\c[14]Waitress:\c[0]\<
Here you go, two cappuccinos. Enjoy.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
So, can I have the video?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Sure, here you go.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Thanks.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Are you going to watch it?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
No way I'm watching my husband's sex tape. That's just disgusting.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
I'll just give it to my lawyer and let him deal with it. He can handle the dirty work.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, that would be for the best.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But in case you end up watching it, I have to warn you about something.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
The girl your husband was having sex with in the video... it's me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You?! Why?! And how?!

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, it’s a long story. What happened was...
\><CENTER>Jane gave her a brief explanation...

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
So that’s what happened.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
That must've been incredibly difficult for you, to sleep with the man who ruined your life.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
It was. But this is how far I'm willing to go to get back at him for everything he's done to me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Don't worry, he'll get what he deserves. I'll make sure of it. I'll make him pay for what he's done to you, and to me.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Anyway, I should go. There’s still plenty of work left to do.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
And this time, it's my turn to give you some good news.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Then I'll be waiting to hear from you.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Hopefully, you won't have to wait long. Talk to you soon.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Excuse me, how much for the coffee?

\>\c[14]Waitress:\c[0]\<
Let’s see... two cappuccinos... that would be Twelve bucks.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Here you go. Keep the change.

\>\c[14]Waitress:\c[0]\<
Thanks. Have a nice day.
$gameSelfSwitches.setValue(key, false);
